hero.badge: The smarter way to manage tasks
hero.title: Organize your work.
hero.subtitle: Empower your life.
hero.description: TaskFlow is the ultimate workspace to track projects, manage tasks, and collaborate effortlessly. Stay productive and focused on what matters most.

features.title: Everything you need to
features.description: Powerful tools designed to streamline your workflow and help your team deliver results faster.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Built for speed. Navigate your tasks and projects with zero friction and instant load times.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data is encrypted and stored securely. We prioritize your privacy above everything else.

organized.title: Stay Organized
organized.description: Powerful sorting, filtering, and categorization tools to keep your workflow crystal clear.

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.description: Invite teammates, assign tasks, and track progress together in real-time workspaces.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.description: Visualize productivity trends and gain insights to optimize your work patterns.

time.title: Time Tracking
time.description: Built-in time tracking to monitor how long tasks take and improve your estimates.

ctaSection.title: Ready to take control of your tasks?
ctaSection.description: Join thousands of professionals who use TaskFlow to manage their work and boost productivity every day.
